scenes.description: Diamond Girlfriend performance by Koseki Biboo, IRyS, and Ninomae Ina'nis.
The performers celebrate after the song, but a portal appears and sucks them in.
Biboo lands in a new stage themed after puzzles.

subtitles.original:
Save me, I think I'm freezing up,
so cold inside
subtitles.english:
Save me, I think I'm freezing up,
so cold inside

subtitles.original: But I'm a quiet blue look at you
subtitles.english: But I'm a quiet blue look at you

subtitles.original:
Save me, I need a guiding touch
in these dark times
subtitles.english:
Save me, I need a guiding touch
in these dark times

subtitles.original: Follow the touch of sheen
subtitles.english: Follow the touch of sheen

subtitles.original:
Inside the maze of your heart,
I'm the soul that strayed
subtitles.english:
Inside the maze of your heart,
I'm the soul that strayed

subtitles.original:
Inside the maze baby look at me,
you're not fine
subtitles.english:
Inside the maze baby look at me,
you're not fine

subtitles.original: Oh can't you see that I can be refined?
subtitles.english: Oh can't you see that I can be refined?

subtitles.original: Your heart is super hot right now
subtitles.english: Your heart is super hot right now

subtitles.original: It's time to be your Diamond Girlfriend
subtitles.english: It's time to be your Diamond Girlfriend

subtitles.original: Overheating love machine burning
subtitles.english: Overheating love machine burning

subtitles.original: Hot, hot, hot, hot, untouchable
subtitles.english: Hot, hot, hot, hot, untouchable

subtitles.original:
Silver flames consuming me
let them light the way
subtitles.english:
Silver flames consuming me
let them light the way

subtitles.original: Precious Girlfriend go go go!
subtitles.english: Precious Girlfriend go go go!

subtitles.original: Overheating love machine burning
subtitles.english: Overheating love machine burning

subtitles.original: Hot, hot, hot, hot, I'm the rock machine
subtitles.english: Hot, hot, hot, hot, I'm the rock machine

subtitles.original: Nothing stops this awakening so
subtitles.english: Nothing stops this awakening so

subtitles.original: Break it all, break it all, break it all
subtitles.english: Break it all, break it all, break it all

subtitles.original: The Diamond Girlfriend!
subtitles.english: The Diamond Girlfriend!

subtitles.original:
Yeah you gotta go hit
beat on my door
subtitles.english:
Yeah you gotta go hit
beat on my door

subtitles.original: 巻き散らすのオーブ、凛々のスパークル
subtitles.english: Spreading out the orbs, the dignified sparkles

subtitles.original:
Just hit it and wheel it,
make the sound ぱちり
subtitles.english:
Just hit it and wheel it,
make the sound 'snap'

subtitles.original: まぶしすぎるメイクアップ、クラムジャム
subtitles.english: A makeup that's way too dazzling, Clam Jam!

subtitles.original:
Trust me,
your weary eyes betray what you've tried to hide
subtitles.english:
Trust me,
your weary eyes betray what you've tried to hide

subtitles.original: 密かな愛しを伝わり
subtitles.english: A secret love is being conveyed

subtitles.original:
Trust me,
I'll never shy away from your dark side
subtitles.english:
Trust me,
I'll never shy away from your dark side

subtitles.original: 道は導きにハイペース
subtitles.english: The path is high-paced towards guidance

subtitles.original:
Under the pressure and fires
these ashes reborn
subtitles.english:
Under the pressure and fires
these ashes reborn

subtitles.original: You're reborn
subtitles.english: You're reborn

subtitles.original: Let me show you who I really am
subtitles.english: Let me show you who I really am

subtitles.original: In the name of love I'll be a gem
subtitles.english: In the name of love I'll be a gem

subtitles.english: Your heart is super hot right now

subtitles.original: It's time to be your Diamond Girlfriend
subtitles.english: It's time to be your Diamond Girlfriend

subtitles.english: Nothing stops this awakening so

subtitles.original: Break it all, break it all, break it all
subtitles.english: Break it all, break it all, break it all

subtitles.original: Now see us, your atomic symbol
subtitles.english: Now see us, your atomic symbol

subtitles.original: ぐるぐる回る、真っ赤になるまで WIMBO
subtitles.english: Spinning around, until it turns deep red, WIMBO

subtitles.original: 愛が足りないとが闇が深いほど
subtitles.english: The more you lack love, the deeper the darkness is

subtitles.original: タッチ・ウェブ・ジャムあつかお I'm a jeweler
subtitles.english: Touch, web, jam, let's play it, I'm a jeweler

subtitles.original: さぁ踊りなさい！
subtitles.english: Now, dance!

subtitles.original:
Shine on, shine bright,
like my flame
subtitles.english:
Shine on, shine bright,
like my flame

subtitles.original: Until it all melts away
subtitles.english: Until it all melts away

subtitles.original: Are you ready?!
subtitles.english: Are you ready?!

subtitles.original: Overheating love machine burning
subtitles.english: Overheating love machine burning

subtitles.original: Hot, hot, hot, hot, untouchable
subtitles.english: Hot, hot, hot, hot, untouchable

let them light the way

subtitles.english: Precious Girlfriend go go go!

subtitles.original: Overheating love machine burning
subtitles.english: Overheating love machine burning

subtitles.original: Hot, hot, hot, hot, I'm the rock machine
subtitles.english: Hot, hot, hot, hot, I'm the rock machine

subtitles.original: Nothing stops this awakening so
subtitles.english: Nothing stops this awakening so

subtitles.original: Break it all, break it all, break it all
subtitles.english: Break it all, break it all, break it all

subtitles.original: No one can stop my shine tonight
subtitles.english: No one can stop my shine tonight

subtitles.original: No one can stop my shine!
subtitles.english: No one can stop my shine!

subtitles.original: やったー！ウフフ！ウフフ！
subtitles.english: Yay! Woohoo! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: Are you guys okay?
subtitles.english: Are you guys okay?

subtitles.original: Yeah.
subtitles.english: Yeah.

subtitles.original: Did I hit you hard?
subtitles.english: Did I hit you hard?

subtitles.original: Goddamn it! Oh yeah!
subtitles.english: Goddamn it! Oh yeah!

subtitles.original: I got the coin! I'm the winner! I win!
subtitles.english: I got the coin! I'm the winner! I win!

subtitles.original: Whoa!
subtitles.english: Whoa!

subtitles.original: Oh! What is that?
subtitles.english: Oh! What is that?

subtitles.original: Portal? Oh a portal!
subtitles.english: Portal? Oh a portal!

subtitles.original: By the way, where did the coin come from, IRyS?
subtitles.english: By the way, where did the coin come from, IRyS?

subtitles.original: Uh, it...
subtitles.english: Uh, it...

subtitles.original:
Don't worry about it!
It came from my Nephilim pocket!
subtitles.english:
Don't worry about it!
It came from my Nephilim pocket!

subtitles.original: Oh no! Goodbye!
subtitles.english: Oh no! Goodbye!

subtitles.original: Ah! The world is spinning! Whoa!
subtitles.english: Ah! The world is spinning! Whoa!

subtitles.original: Ugh... I'm dizzy...
subtitles.english: Ugh... I'm dizzy...

subtitles.original: Huh? Is this the puzzle stage?
subtitles.english: Huh? Is this the puzzle stage?

subtitles.original: Hey! I'm ready for my next challenge now!
subtitles.english: Hey! I'm ready for my next challenge now!

subtitles.original: Hey, come out! Hey!
subtitles.english: Hey, come out! Hey!
